pathways.name: Swift Modernization Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 6.2's approachable concurrency, new memory types, and modern data persistence. Start with the language overview, learn the concurrency model, apply it hands-on, then understand how SwiftUI leverages it.

pathways.name: AI/ML Developer Path
pathways.description: Build on-device AI features using the Foundation Models framework. Start with the landscape overview, learn the framework, go deep on guided generation and tool calling, practice with code, then master prompt safety.

pathways.name: Liquid Glass Adoption Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new Liquid Glass design system across all Apple platforms. Begin with the design principles, learn the design system details, then apply to your framework of choice.

pathways.name: Spatial Computing Path
pathways.description: Build visionOS apps from windowed to fully immersive. Start with the platform overview, learn spatial SwiftUI layout, integrate RealityKit, manage scenes, then add shared experiences.

pathways.name: Performance Mastery Path
pathways.description: Systematically optimize your app's CPU, memory, SwiftUI rendering, and power consumption. Follow the recommended order: fix algorithms first, then software overheads, then CPU micro-optimizations.

pathways.name: UIKit Modernization Path
pathways.description: Bring your UIKit app up to date with the new design system, scene lifecycle (mandatory soon), and modern APIs. Covers the urgent migration items.

pathways.name: App Intents & Intelligence Path
pathways.description: Make your app a first-class citizen of Siri, Spotlight, Shortcuts, and Apple Intelligence. Learn the framework, explore advanced features, then integrate with Shortcuts and the Use Model action.

pathways.name: Immersive Video Path
pathways.description: Create and play immersive video content for visionOS, from spatial video to Apple Immersive Video. Start with the video landscape overview, then dive into playback implementation and production technologies.

pathways.name: Security & Privacy Path
pathways.description: Harden your app against current and future threats. Covers quantum-secure cryptography, passkey adoption, privacy integration, and child safety frameworks.

pathways.name: Metal 4 & Games Path
pathways.description: Adopt Metal 4 for game engines and graphics-intensive apps. Follow the phased adoption strategy: start with the overview, optimize command encoding, add ray tracing and MetalFX, then integrate ML.

pathways.name: MLX Research & Fine-Tuning Path
pathways.description: Run and fine-tune large language models locally on Apple Silicon with MLX. For ML engineers and researchers who want to go beyond the on-device Foundation Models framework.

pathways.name: New Developer Essentials Path
pathways.description: A curated introduction to Apple platform development for newcomers. Covers design fundamentals, SwiftUI, Xcode tooling, accessibility principles, and on-device AI.

pathways.name: Accessibility Champion Path
pathways.description: Make your app inclusive and accessible to all users. Covers principles, evaluation, platform-specific implementation, and specialized access modes.
